subject: (no subject)
body:
Here is Daniels Estes response re items you thought were picked up - how do you want me to proceed

The only items we procured on Jeffrey’s behalf from Leah were a pair of pink crystal lamps (not either of the ones shown in the pictures), a statue of a wood horse – both of these were delivered to Brandon Storage in West Palm Beach.  The lamps have been delivered to the house and the statue is still in storage.  We did have the large drawing (image 2710) picked up by our framer as well.  They still have it (in Queens) awaiting confirmation of framing details.  The remaining items – the bust clock, the end tables, the (2) pairs of lamps shown in the images and the pair of vases were not picked up by us.

 






Thx

G
body_html:
Here is Daniels Estes response re items you thought were picked up - how do you want me to proceed

The only items we procured on Jeffrey’s behalf from Leah were a pair of pink crystal lamps (not either of the ones shown in the pictures), a statue of a wood horse – both of these were delivered to Brandon Storage in West Palm Beach.  The lamps have been delivered to the house and the statue is still in storage.  We did have the large drawing (image 2710) picked up by our framer as well.  They still have it (in Queens) awaiting confirmation of framing details.  The remaining items – the bust clock, the end tables, the (2) pairs of lamps shown in the images and the pair of vases were not picked up by us.








Thx

G
